text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's time for the Japan Cup. Everyone has their
attention on Hishi Amazon, and they're looking
forward to her showdown with Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's something Hishi Amazon must do. Narita
Brian once told her that there's someone she
wishes to overtake...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
